Text.val: This could also be done with a Boolean in Task->Range/Locate->Expressions

Text.valUnicode: Note: samples with asterisk in their public name are not fully functional and are planned to be supported in future versions.

Text.val: Otherwise the entry is a program name and description
Update the visible parts of the tree, and the public name for the program
Update the counter that tracks our subcategory
Create this category (or use old one, if the menu already exists)
